The '''''Titan''''' was an [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]] active in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==History==
In [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]], it was part of [[Task Force Vengeance]] when it was tasked with retrieving the [[Immobilizer 418 Interdictor-class Heavy Cruiser|Interdictor]] ''[[Compellor]]'' together with the ISD [[Juggernaut (Star Destroyer)|''Juggernaut'']]. Witnessing the destruction of the ''Compellor'', ''Titan'' joined the ''Juggernaut''{{'s}} [[Retreat from Gallofree|unsuccessful attack]] on the [[Airam (group)|Airam]] [[Deep Space Manufacturing Facility|X7 factory]] ''[[Gallofree]]''.<ref name="BoP" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing vs. TIE Fighter: Balance of Power Campaigns]]'' {{1st}}
